ink.description: All body text. Warm charcoal — softer than pure black, no blue hue.

mid.description: Decorative italic subtitles, secondary text. 2.8:1 — NOT for functional text.

mid-accessible.description: All functional mid-coloured text (hints, labels, descriptions). WCAG AA 4.6:1 on cream.

hint.description: Placeholders, hint text, very secondary. Use sparingly.

cta.description: Primary CTA button, FAB, Export button, active nav tab, active filter pill. The ONLY bright color in the app.

cta-fg.description: Text and icons on CTA background. Lavender-white.

plum.description: Done overlay background. SACRED — appears nowhere else.

plum-pale.description: Done overlay ii mark pill fill.

overdue-badge.description: Overdue badge background. Warm brown — NOT red. Cream text on top.

category._note: v10.5 — category backgrounds are SOLID pastel fills, never opacity-based. Icon strokes use the darkened category color. No borders on colored cards.

home-bg.description: Home card background — solid pastel, Anthropic blush

home-icon.description: Home icon stroke — darkened version of home-bg

garden-bg.description: Garden card background — solid leaf green pastel

garden-icon.description: Garden icon stroke — darkened version of garden-bg

vehicle-bg.description: Vehicle card background — solid steel mist pastel

vehicle-icon.description: Vehicle icon stroke — darkened version of vehicle-bg

subscriptions-bg.description: Subscriptions card background — solid lavender pastel

subscriptions-icon.description: Subscriptions icon stroke — darkened version of subscriptions-bg

health-bg.description: Health card background — soft olive pastel (v2 category)

health-icon.description: Health icon stroke — olive tint (was pink in pre-v10.5)

pets-bg.description: Pets card background — warm amber pastel

pets-icon.description: Pets icon stroke — warm amber dark

dark._note: v10.5 — warm dark mode. No blue or cool-green tint anywhere.

bg.description: Dark mode app background. Warm dark cream — no blue, no green.

nav.description: Dark mode nav bar and FAB options surface

home-bg.description: Home card background in dark mode

garden-bg.description: Garden card background in dark mode

vehicle-bg.description: Vehicle card background in dark mode

subscriptions-bg.description: Subscriptions card background in dark mode

health-bg.description: Health card background in dark mode

pets-bg.description: Pets card background in dark mode

border.description: Dark mode card borders — warm hairline

value.note: Cream text on overdue-badge bg pill

_legacy._note: Pre-v10.5 values — archived 2026-03-30. Kept for comparison and rollback. Do not use in new work.

ink.description: LEGACY — replaced by #2C2824 in v10.5. Was too dark/harsh.

apricot.description: LEGACY — removed in v10.5. Was used for done overlay dot, streak number, greeting name em. Greeting name em is now colorCta (plum-lt).

apricot-dk.description: LEGACY — removed in v10.5. Was primary CTA and due-soon date labels. CTA is now colorCta (#9B7FD4), due-soon dates are plain text at 55% opacity.

terra.description: LEGACY — removed in v10.5. Was overdue status color. Replaced by warm brown badge (#6B4A3A) — less alarming, more on-brand.

dark-terra.description: LEGACY — removed with terra in v10.5. Dark mode overdue variant.

mid-lt.description: LEGACY — removed in v10.5. Was upcoming date label color. Dates now use ink at 55% opacity with no background.

category._note: Pre-v10.5 — category colors were used as icon strokes with 10% opacity tint backgrounds (rgba). Replaced by solid pastel fills in v10.5.

home-bg.description: LEGACY opacity tint bg — replaced by solid #D2BEB6

vehicle-bg.description: LEGACY opacity tint bg — replaced by solid #C0CDD8

garden-bg.description: LEGACY opacity tint bg — replaced by solid #C0CEC9

subscriptions-bg.description: LEGACY opacity tint bg — replaced by solid #D0C6DC

health.description: LEGACY icon stroke — was pink, replaced by olive #6A6858 in v10.5

health-bg.description: LEGACY opacity tint bg — replaced by solid #D2D0C4

bg.description: LEGACY dark bg — replaced by #1E1C18. Was too dark/green-tinted.

card.description: LEGACY dark card — replaced by #28261F (now nav surface).

card-hover.description: LEGACY dark hover — removed in v10.5.

text-secondary.description: LEGACY dark mid — replaced by #96908A (warmer, less green).

border.description: LEGACY dark border — was green-tinted hairline. Replaced by warm rgba(224,221,214,0.08).

card.description: LEGACY card radius — was 12px, now 16px in v10.5.
